# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 502. Registration of Vehicles
##### § 502.168 — Fee: Motor Bus

The fee for a registration year for registration of a motor bus is the fee prescribed by Section 502.252 or 502.253 , as applicable.

*Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1135 (H.B.2741), Sec. 70, eff. September 1, 2013.*
